refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: imout = imwarpPerspective(imin, warpmat) imout = imwarpPerspective(imin, warpmat, width, height)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: imwarpPerspective is a convenience wrapper over imtransform with perspective mode.

refsection.title: Examples
